center.name: Mount Talinis
center.summary: Mount Talinis是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括棕尾斑嘴犀鳥、Visayan cuckooshrike、Flame-templed babbler等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also occurs in the proposed Central Panay Mountain Range Park which contains the largest block of remaining forest in the Western Visayas, and the tourist destination of Twin Lakes (Mount Talinis)
